name: fa2sw-onegraph
description: int4 QAT Gemma endpoint. fa2sw (FA2 sliding-window on hd=256 local layers) + onegraph (single full decode CUDA graph) are implemented and env-gated, but DEFAULT OFF: the conc=1 ablation found fa2sw -4.9% TPS, onegraph parity, and both DIVERGENT (greedy-invalid) vs the int4 base. With levers off this serves the verified int4 base. See research/fa2sw_onegraph/ and the submission README.
